title: Candle Fittings Disposable Aluminum Foil Candle Holder Drip Cups Aluminum Liners Inserts for Oil Menorah Cups 60 Pack
features: [Versatile Candle Adapters]: Our disposable aluminum foil candle adapters effectively address the issue of candles with smaller diameters not fitting properly into candle holders, ensuring a secure fit for various candle sizes.

[Effortless to Use Foil Adapters]: Just place the aluminum foil adapter in the candle holder and insert your candle. For candles that are too small, stacking multiple adapters will provide a better grip. After use, these aluminum foil holders can be easily discarded or reused as needed.​

[Universal Size Fit]: Our flexible aluminum inserts are designed to fit most standard candle holders and can be pinched to adjust the size for a perfect match. Measuring 0.9 x 0.59 inch, each pack contains 60 pieces to meet your multiple needs.​

[Hassle-Free Storage of Candle Tools]: These aluminum foil accessories are not only adjustable but also simple to clean, allowing for easy removal after the candle has burned. Their specially designed outer packaging makes storage convenient and mess-free.​

[Ideal for All Occasions]: Whether you're lighting candles for Advent, Shabbat, Hanukkah, church vigils, or using them as emergency lights, our aluminum foil adapters are suitable for all these festive and practical occasions.
